MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Isaac Jacobson, 415.715.9928 for Defendant Kiesha Stephens.
Claudia Mourad, 949.859.5600 for Plaintiff Chicage Title Company.

Court and counsel discuss whether the substitute service on the Defendant was proper. Substitute service was on a security guard and the CEO of the security company stated that no by that name worked for the company. The Court finds that service was not proper. Mr. Jacobson states he will accept service on behalf of the Defendant and that service can be done by email. ms. Mourad confirms that she has Mr. Jacobson's contact information.

The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT KIESHA STEPHENS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted. Mr. Jacobson to prepare the order. The Court states that a signature by the Defendant is required on the order stating that she approves Mr. Jacobson accepting service on her behalf. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
